From: New team lead
To: BI

Quick history question - why did we exclude the five enterprise accounts from the churn
metric? I want to explain it in tomorrow's review. The knowledge base is below.

--- knowledge-base/decisions.md ---
- 2026-05-20 - Locked Monthly Logo Churn v1.1: population = paying customers, status NOT
  IN (trial, internal, test); approved by RevOps (per timeline 05-20).
- 2026-05-28 - Adopted UTC date basis for all churn reporting; owner: BI (J. Park).

in the May run; flagged to RevOps; no response recorded yet.
